title: 9 Current Conflicts in the World Today and Their Effects on Global Hunger - World Food Program USA
summary: Ongoing global conflicts are significantly exacerbating food insecurity across various regions, pushing millions into severe hunger. These protracted crises disrupt agricultural production and supply chains, making it increasingly difficult for humanitarian aid to reach vulnerable populations.

title: What role is China playing in global geopolitical transformations? - Al Jazeera
summary: China is increasingly asserting its influence on the international stage, actively shaping geopolitical dynamics through economic initiatives and diplomatic engagements. This growing presence is prompting a re-evaluation of global power structures and alliances worldwide.

title: The World This Week | US Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s global tariffs, tensions with Iran reach a tipping point, India-Israel elevate ties - The Indian Express
summary: This week saw significant international developments, including a US Supreme Court decision overturning previous global tariffs, which could impact international trade relations. Concurrently, escalating tensions with Iran have reached a critical juncture, while India and Israel are strengthening their bilateral ties.

title: World reacts to US, Israel attack on Iran, Tehran retaliation - Al Jazeera
summary: The international community is closely monitoring the aftermath of recent military actions involving the US, Israel, and Iran. Global leaders are expressing concerns about regional stability following reports of retaliatory measures from Tehran.

title: From Japan to Israel, elections are reshaping global politics - Australian Broadcasting Corporation
summary: Electoral processes in nations ranging from Japan to Israel are currently driving significant shifts in global political landscapes. These democratic exercises are leading to new leadership and policy directions that could redefine international relations and alliances.

title: IT rules: India proposes new digital rules to regulate news and political posts on social media - BBC
summary: India is introducing new digital regulations aimed at governing content, including news and political discussions, shared on social media platforms. These proposed rules seek to establish a framework for oversight over online discourse, potentially impacting freedom of expression and information dissemination.

title: MeitY secretary says every social media user posting on current affairs can come under I&B oversight - ThePrint
summary: A senior official from the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology has indicated that individuals posting on current affairs on social media platforms could fall under the purview of the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting. This statement highlights the government's expanding regulatory ambitions concerning online content and user-generated posts.

title: UPSC Mains Current Affairs for 11 May 2026 - Vajiram & Ravi
summary: A daily compilation of significant national and international events has been released, providing essential updates for civil services aspirants. This resource aims to keep students informed on key developments across various sectors, crucial for their examination preparation.

title: India’s hosts AI Impact Summit, drawing world leaders, tech giants - Al Jazeera
summary: India recently convened a major AI Impact Summit, attracting prominent global leaders and technology executives. This event underscored India's growing influence in shaping international discourse around artificial intelligence.

title: AI impact summit 2026 positions India as voice of the global south - IBS Intelligence
summary: The 2026 AI Impact Summit served as a platform for India to assert itself as a leading advocate for the Global South in AI development and governance. This strategic positioning aims to ensure equitable representation and benefits from emerging AI technologies worldwide.

title: SAHI: Radical Artificial Intelligence for Health Framework from India - ICTworks
summary: India has introduced the SAHI framework, a groundbreaking initiative leveraging artificial intelligence to transform the healthcare sector. This innovative approach seeks to address critical health challenges and improve outcomes across the nation.

title: India’s Global AI Pitch Masks A Troubling Reality At Home - Tech Policy Press
summary: While India actively promotes its global leadership in AI, domestic challenges and ethical concerns within its own AI landscape persist. Critics argue that the nation's international narrative often overshadows the complex realities faced by its citizens regarding AI implementation.

title: On the road to the India AI Impact Summit: Global AI governance and the HAIP Reporting Framework - Brookings
summary: Ahead of the India AI Impact Summit, discussions focused on establishing robust global AI governance structures, including the proposed HAIP Reporting Framework. These efforts aim to create a standardized and transparent approach to AI development and deployment worldwide.

title: India Issues 2025 AI Governance Guidelines- How It Compares to Other Global AI Acts - The National Law Review
summary: India has released its 2025 AI Governance Guidelines, outlining the nation's regulatory approach to artificial intelligence. These guidelines are being critically examined to understand how they align with or diverge from existing global AI legislation and best practices.
